title: OS Name
description: Retrieves the standard name of the operating system.

title: OS Version
query: (name of it, version of it) of operating system
description: Gets both the name and the specific version of the OS.

title: OS Architecture
query: (name of it, architecture of it) of operating system
description: Checks if the OS is 32-bit or 64-bit architecture.

title: Is Windows
description: Returns true if the endpoint is running Microsoft Windows.

title: Is Mac
description: Returns true if the endpoint is running macOS.

title: Is Unix
description: Returns true if the endpoint is running Unix/Linux.

title: Win Service Pack
query: service pack major version of operating system
description: Gets the major service pack integer for Windows machines.

title: Uptime
description: Returns a time interval showing how long the system has been running.

title: OS Introspector
description: Lists all available relevance properties for the OS object.

title: Processor Vendors
description: Lists the vendor name for every logical processor.

title: Unique Processor Vendors
query: unique values of vendor names of processors
description: Collapses identical processor vendors into a single result.

title: Processor Speeds
description: Returns the clock speed of installed processors.

title: Processor Family
description: Identifies the specific CPU family (e.g. Core i7).

title: RAM Introspector
description: Lists all available relevance properties for RAM.

title: Drive Names
description: Returns the letter or mount point of connected drives.

title: Mac Free Space
description: Checks the free space of the primary macOS volume.

title: Windows Drive Space
query: (free spaces of it, names of it) of drives
description: Gets free space in bytes alongside the drive letter.

title: Drive Introspector
description: Lists all available relevance properties for drive objects.

title: Parent Folder of File
description: Finds the directory containing a specific file.

title: Parent Folder of Folder
query: parent folder of folder "C:\Program Files (x86)\BigFix Enterprise\BES Client"
description: Traverses up one directory level.

title: Folder Name
description: Returns just the string name of the target folder.

title: Folder Path
query: pathname of folder "C:\Program Files (x86)\BigFix Enterprise\BES Client"
description: Returns the absolute path of a specified folder.

title: File Exists (Unix)
description: Validates if a file exists in a Unix path.

title: File Exists (Windows)
description: Validates if a file exists in a Windows path.

title: Regapp File Path
description: Finds the file path of a registered application.

title: System File Check
description: Checks for a specific DLL in the OS system folder.

title: System File Name
query: name of file "mshtml.dll" of system folder
description: Returns the exact name of a file in the system folder.

title: System File Parent
query: name of parent folder of file "mshtml.dll" of system folder
description: Gets the system folder name (e.g. System32).

title: System File Path
query: pathname of file "mshtml.dll" of system folder
description: Gets the absolute path to a system folder file.

title: File Mod Time
query: modification time of file "mshtml.dll" of system folder
description: Retrieves the last modified timestamp of a file.

title: File Version
query: version of file "mshtml.dll" of system folder
description: Extracts the version metadata from a Windows file.

title: File Size
query: size of file "mshtml.dll" of system folder
description: Returns the size of the file in bytes.

title: File SHA1
query: sha1 of file "mshtml.dll" of system folder
description: Calculates the SHA1 hash of a file for integrity checking.

title: Read Text File (Line 1)
description: Reads the first line of content inside a text file.

title: Folder Introspector
description: Lists all available relevance properties for folders.

title: File Introspector
description: Lists all available relevance properties for files.

title: Key Exists
description: Tests if a specific registry key exists.

title: Value Exists in Key
query: exists value whose (name of it is "Version") of key "HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\BigFix\EnterpriseClient" of registry
description: Validates if a specific value exists inside a key.

title: Get Value
description: Retrieves the contents of a registry value.

title: List Names & Values
query: (names of it, it) of values of key "HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\BigFix\EnterpriseClient" of registry
description: Iterates through all values inside a registry key.

title: Last Write Time
query: last write time of key "HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\BigFix\EnterpriseClient" of registry
description: Shows when the registry key was last modified.

title: Non-Loopback IPs
query: addresses whose (it as string != "0.0.0.0") of ip interfaces whose (loopback of it = false) of network as string
description: Finds real IP addresses assigned to the machine.

title: IPs
query: (addresses of it) of ip interfaces of network as string
description: Gets IP addresses of network interfaces.

title: Adapter Names
description: Lists all network interface adapter names.

title: Active Adapters
query: friendly names of adapters whose (up of it = true) of network
description: Shows only adapters that are currently active/online.

title: Online IPv4 Addresses
query: addresses of ipv4 interfaces whose (exists address of it) of adapters whose (up of it = true) of network
description: Retrieves active IPv4 addresses filtering out disconnected ones.

title: Adapter Names & IPv4s
query: (name of adapter of it, addresses of it) of ipv4 interfaces of adapters whose (up of it = true) of network
description: Pairs the friendly adapter name with its IPv4 address.

title: CIDR Strings
query: (name of adapter of it, cidr string of it) of ipv4 interfaces of adapters whose (up of it = true) of network
description: Returns subnet mask information in CIDR format.

title: Subnet Check (192.168)
query: exists (ipv4 interfaces of adapters whose (up of it = true) of network) whose (cidr string of it = "192.168.44.0/24")
description: Tests if the machine is active on a specific subnet.

title: Network Introspector
description: Lists all available relevance properties for networking.

title: List All Regapps
description: Returns the executables of all registered applications.

title: Regapp Versions
query: (names of it, versions of it) of regapps
description: Pairs the application executable with its version number.

title: Check Chrome (Win)
description: Checks if Google Chrome is installed on Windows.

title: Check Chrome (Mac)
description: Checks if Google Chrome is installed on macOS.

title: Missing Chrome (Win)
description: Returns true if Google Chrome is missing on Windows.

title: Missing Chrome (Mac)
description: Returns true if Google Chrome is missing on macOS.

title: Compare Version Strings
description: Demonstrates logic for comparing version objects safely.

title: Chrome Version Check (Win)
query: exists regapp "chrome.exe" whose (version of it < "55.0.5.14" as version)
description: Finds Windows endpoints running outdated versions of Chrome.

title: Chrome Version Check (Mac)
query: exists regapp "Google Chrome.app" whose (version of it < "55.0.5.14" as version)
description: Finds macOS endpoints running outdated versions of Chrome.

title: App Introspector
description: Lists all available relevance properties for applications.

title: Service Exists
description: Checks if a service is installed, regardless of running state.

title: Service Running
description: Checks if a specific service is currently active.

title: All Services Details
query: (display name of it, login account of it, state of it, image paths of it) of services
description: Gets comprehensive telemetry on all installed services.

title: List Raw Services
description: Returns raw service objects.

title: Service Introspector
description: Lists all available relevance properties for services.

title: User Introspector
description: Lists all available relevance properties for users.

title: Filter User Properties
query: properties whose (it as string contains "password") of type "user"
description: Finds user properties containing the keyword password.

title: Current user
description: Returns the names of actively logged on users.svzvdv

title: Oldest App Log Record
query: description of record (oldest record number of it) of application event log
description: Fetches the description of the oldest application event.

title: App Log Exists
description: Validates the existence of the Application event log.

title: Mapped Drives (Raw)
description: Queries WMI for logical disk provider names.

title: WMI Introspector
description: Lists all available relevance properties for WMI queries.

title: OS + Hardware Combo
query: (name of operating system, family names of processors, (size of ram) / (1024*1024*1024))
description: Provides full hardware and software system profiling in one query.

title: Win Registry + File System Combo
query: if (windows of operating system) then (exists file "mshtml.dll" of system folder AND exists key "HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE" of registry) else false
description: Win Registry + File System Combo validation.

title: Drive Volumes
description: Returns volume names of connected drives.

title: Drive Types
description: Identifies if a drive is fixed, removable, or network.

title: Free Spaces (Bytes)
description: Raw free space in bytes across all drives.

title: Total Spaces (Bytes)
description: Raw total space in bytes across all drives.

title: Root Folders
description: Returns the top-level directory folder of all drives.

title: File System Types
description: Checks if the drive is NTFS, FAT32, exFAT, etc.

title: Is Compressed?
query: (name of it, fs_vol_is_compressed of it) of drives
description: Checks if the OS level volume compression is enabled.

title: Supports Encryption?
query: (name of it, file_supports_encryption of it) of drives
description: Checks if the file system natively supports encryption.

title: Size of RAM (Bytes)
description: Total installed physical memory in bytes.

title: Total Amount of RAM
description: Available total memory object.

title: Used RAM Amount
description: Amount of memory currently consumed by the OS.

title: Free RAM Amount
description: Amount of memory currently available.

title: Base Name
description: Returns the core name of the OS without version modifiers.

title: Release Details
description: Returns the OS release string.

title: Build Number
description: Returns the OS compile build identifier.

title: Machine Type
description: Identifies the platform hardware type.

title: Major/Minor Version
query: (major version of it, minor version of it) of operating system
description: Splits the OS version into major and minor integers.

title: Is Virtual Machine?
description: Detects if the OS is running inside a hypervisor.

title: Boot Time
description: Timestamp of when the OS was last powered on.

title: Winsock2 Supported
description: Checks for Winsock2 API support on Windows.

title: All Service Names
description: Returns the short names of all services.

title: Display Names
description: Returns the user-friendly names of all services.

title: Service States
description: Checks if services are Running, Stopped, or Paused.

title: Start Types
description: Checks if services are Automatic, Manual, or Disabled.

title: Image Paths
description: Returns the binary paths for service executables.

title: Is Running? (Boolean)
description: Returns a true/false boolean for active services.

title: Process IDs (PIDs)
description: Maps running services to their Windows Process IDs.

title: System Files Sizes
query: sizes of files of system folder
description: Iterates the size of every file in the System folder.

title: System Files Versions
query: versions of files of system folder
description: Iterates versions of all files in the System folder.

title: System Files MD5s
query: md5s of files of system folder
description: Calculates MD5 hashes for system files.

title: System Files SHA256
query: sha256s of files of system folder
description: Calculates SHA256 hashes for system files.

title: Folder Descendants
description: Recursively searches down a folder tree.

title: WMI OS Query
description: Direct WMI query to retrieve OS class properties.

title: Non-Auto Running Services
query: (service name of it, state of it, start type of it) of services whose (state of it = "Running" AND start type of it != "auto")
description: Detects services that are currently running but are not configured to start automatically.

title: Drives Low on Space (<10%)
query: (name of it, free space of it * 100 / total space of it) of drives whose (free space of it * 100 / total space of it < 10)
description: Detects drives running dangerously low on disk space (less than 10% capacity).

title: Local Administrators
description: Lists all user accounts that possess local administrator rights.

title: Registry Value Mismatch
query: exists key "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Test" whose (value "Config" of it as string != "ExpectedValue") of registry
description: Detects wrong config values by checking if a registry key does not match an expected string.

title: Win + Service + Registry Combo
query: if (windows of operating system) then (exists service "BesClient" whose (state of it = "Running") AND exists key "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\BigFix\EnterpriseClient" of registry) else false
description: Ensures the BigFix client is installed, running, and its core registry key exists.

title: Low Disk + High RAM Combo
query: exists drives whose ((free space of it * 100 / total space of it < 15) AND (free amount of ram < 2*1024*1024*1024))
description: Detects stressed systems suffering from both low disk space and low available RAM.

title: Active Network + Old Chrome
query: exists adapters whose (up of it = true) of network AND exists regapp "chrome.exe" whose (version of it < "100.0.0.0" as version)
description: Finds active machines that are running severely outdated versions of Chrome.

title: File + Version + OS Check
query: if (windows of operating system) then (exists file "mshtml.dll" of system folder AND version of file "mshtml.dll" of system folder < "11.0.0.0") else false
description: Detects outdated or vulnerable system DLLs on Windows machines.

title: OS + CPU + RAM Profiling
query: (name of operating system, unique values of vendor names of processors, (total amount of ram / (1024*1024*1024)))
description: Provides full hardware and software system profiling in one query.

title: Registry + Time + File
query: exists key "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\BigFix\EnterpriseClient" whose (last write time of it > (now - 30*day)) of registry AND exists file "notepad.exe" of system folder
description: Checks for recent registry activity (last 30 days) and file validation simultaneously.

title: Network CIDR + OS Filter
query: windows of operating system AND exists (ipv4 interfaces of adapters whose (up of it = true) of network) whose (cidr string of it starts with "192.168")
description: Identifies Windows machines residing on a specific internal subnet.

title: Encryption Capable + Low Space
query: (name of it, file_supports_encryption of it, free space of it) of drives whose (file_supports_encryption of it = true AND free space of it < 5*1024*1024*1024)
description: Finds encryption-capable drives that are running out of space (under 5GB).

title: Folder Traverse + File Type
query: exists descendants whose (name of it ends with ".log") of folder "C:\temp"
description: Recursively discovers specific log files hidden deep inside a directory tree.

title: Adapter + IP + OS Mapping
query: (name of operating system, (name of adapter of it, addresses of it) of ipv4 interfaces of adapters whose (up of it = true) of network)
description: Maps the operating system directly to active network adapters and IP addresses.

title: Service + Account + Path
query: (display name of it, login account of it, image path of it) of services whose (state of it = "Running")
description: Maps running services to their execution context, service account, and binary path.

title: VM + CPU Check
query: (virtual machine of operating system, unique values of vendor names of processors)
description: Checks if the machine is virtualized alongside the CPU vendor name.

title: Ultimate Endpoint Health
query: if (windows of operating system) then (exists service "BesClient" whose (state of it = "Running") AND exists file "mshtml.dll" of system folder AND exists key "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\BigFix\EnterpriseClient" of registry AND exists adapters whose (up of it = true) of network) else false
description: Full endpoint health validation checking OS, Files, Registry, Services, and Networking.

title: Introspect: Process Properties
description: Returns a list of all available properties you can query for a process object.

title: Introspect: DMI Properties
description: Returns a list of all available properties you can query for the DMI (SMBIOS) object.

title: Introspect: Hardware Properties
description: Returns a list of all available properties you can query for the hardware object.

title: Introspect: Firewall Properties
description: Returns a list of all available properties you can query for the firewall object.

title: Introspect: Environment Properties
description: Returns a list of all available properties you can query for the environment object.

title: Names of Processes
description: Returns a simple list of the names of all currently running processes.

title: PIDs of Processes
description: Returns a simple list of the Process IDs for all running processes.

title: Environment Variables
query: (name of it & "=" & value of it) of variables of environment
description: Safely lists all environment variables in a Name=Value format.

title: BIOS Version
description: Returns the system BIOS version.

title: Hardware Serial
description: Returns the physical hardware serial number.

title: Properties of BES Computer
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes computer' object.

title: Properties of BES Fixlet
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes fixlet' object.

title: Properties of BES Action
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes action' object.

title: Properties of BES Property
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes property' object.

title: Properties of BES Site
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes site' object.

title: List All Computer Names
description: Returns a simple list of all endpoints reporting to the Root Server.

title: Computer Hardware Inventory
query: (id of it, name of it, operating system of it, cpu of it, ip addresses of it) of bes computers
description: Pulls core hardware and OS inventory for all registered endpoints.

title: Last Report Times
query: (name of it, last report time of it) of bes computers
description: Checks the last time each endpoint checked in with the server.

title: Computer Relay Alignment
query: (name of it, relay server of it, root server of it) of bes computers
description: Identifies which relay each endpoint is currently reporting to.

title: List Relevant Fixlets
query: (id of it, name of it, applicable computer count of it) of bes fixlets whose (applicable computer count of it > 0)
description: Finds all Fixlets that are currently relevant to at least one endpoint.

title: Custom Fixlets Only
query: (id of it, name of it) of bes fixlets whose (custom flag of it = true)
description: Lists Fixlets created by your local operators, excluding out-of-the-box IBM/HCL content.

title: Fixlets with No Default Action
query: (id of it, name of it) of bes fixlets whose (not exists default action of it)
description: Identifies Fixlets that require manual action selection to deploy.

title: All Running/Open Actions
query: (ids of it, names of it) of bes actions whose (state of it = "Open")
description: Displays all deployment actions currently active in the environment.

title: Action Results (Summary)
query: (names of computers of it, detailed statuses of it, exit codes of it) of results of bes actions whose (id of it = 12345)
description: REPLACE '12345' with an Action ID to see execution results across all targeted endpoints.

title: Failed Actions
query: (ids of actions of it, names of computers of it, detailed statuses of it) of results whose (detailed status of it as lowercase contains "failed") of bes actions
description: Finds specific computers where an action deployment failed.

title: List All Global Properties
description: Lists the names of all retrieved properties configured in the environment.

title: Get Property Results for Computers
query: (name of computer of it, values of it) of results of bes property "User Name"
description: Extracts the reported values for a specific global property across all endpoints.

title: List Custom Sites
query: (name of it, url of it) of bes sites whose (custom site flag of it = true)
description: Shows all custom sites created in your specific deployment.

title: Properties of BES Server
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes server' object.

title: Properties of BES Product
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes product' object.

title: Properties of BES Computer Group
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes computer group' object.

title: Properties of BES Domain
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes domain' object.

title: Properties of BES WebUI
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes webui' object.

title: Properties of BES Wizard
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes wizard' object.

title: Properties of BES Property Result
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes property result' object.

title: Properties of BES Fixlet Result
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes fixlet result' object.

title: Properties of BES Action Result
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes action result' object.

title: Properties of BES Action Status
description: Lists all available Session Relevance properties for the 'bes action status' object.
